ui_response.ui_state: Thinking... / Copilot is responding... - stuck indefinitely, no text rendered

console_state.warning_details: Matched leaf route at location '/copilot' warnings

diagnosis.pattern: Etap intercepts messages POST and returns 200 with correct Content-Type (text/event-stream) but sends NO SSE events in the body. Copilot frontend stays in Thinking state waiting for SSE data events.
diagnosis.likely_cause: Strategy B (end_stream=false, is_http2=2) keeps connection open but Etap's block response does not include properly formatted SSE events (data: {...}\n\n). The warning content may be sent as raw body instead of SSE format.
action_needed: Etap block response for SSE services must format warning as SSE events: 'data: {json}\n\n'
Each chunk of the warning should be a separate SSE data event
Stream must end with a completion signal SSE event (e.g., data: [DONE])
Consider if end_stream=true might work better for SSE - send all events then close
